title: Food safety incidents in Beijing: occurrence patterns, causes and wider social implications

meta_data.Data_Name: ZCCW.info Food Safety Incidents in China database
meta_data.Data_summary: A volunteer-created database compiling publicly available reports of food contamination and food safety incidents in mainland China. It provides incident records used by the authors to extract Beijing-specific incidents and construct incident timing series including occurrence dates and media report dates for inter-event-interval analysis.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: Our research data are taken from ZCCW.info http://www.zccw.info/index which is a database of food safety incidents in China created by volunteers Wu 2012; Location: Data and methods; Confidence: high
meta_data.Geographic_Coverage: China > Mainland China > Beijing subset used

meta_data.Data_Name: Replication data for Food safety incidents in Beijing hosted on Dataverse
meta_data.Data_summary: A publicly released dataset deposit containing the processed incident records and derived inter-event-interval series used in the study analyses of food safety incident timing in Beijing.
meta_data.Other_Information: Evidence: The dataset analysed in this study is available in the Dataverse repository Liu FY Liu Y Gao JB and Zhang JF 2015a http://dx.doi.org/10.7910/DVN/Q8DDM9; Location: Data Availability; Confidence: high
